scene.scenePrompt: Wide establishing shot of a dimly lit bedroom at night. A single warm desk lamp casts a soft golden pool of light on a cluttered wooden desk, where gift-wrapping supplies and a half-finished box lie. In the background, a full-length standing mirror leans against the wall, its surface catching a faint, cold blue reflection of the room. The overall atmosphere is intimate, quiet, and tense, with deep shadows in the corners. The composition is vertical, focusing on the desk and mirror as central elements, bathed in contrasting warm and cool light.

beats.narration: The warm light of the desk lamp casts a small, soft glow on the velvet. Your fingertips brush over the hollowed-out patterns of the silver brooch. This was the first antique you and Lu Chen restored together, and now you are turning it into a birthday gift. Tomorrow is his birthday.

You look up, habitually glancing at the full-length mirror in the corner of your bedroom to see how tired you look. But the mirror's surface... is trembling. Like a stone thrown into water, ripples spread across it, distorting the light and shadow.
The ripples subside. The sight reflected in the mirror freezes the blood in your veins instantly.

Another 'you.' She is wearing a blood-red velvet dress you have never bought, her makeup exquisite and sharp. She is snuggling in Lu Chen's arms, her fingers gently tracing the collar of his shirt. And Lu Chen... his face wears the gentle smile you know all too well.

activeCharacters.name: Su Wanqing in the Mirror
activeCharacters.pose: Dressed in a red gown with sharp makeup, snuggling in Lu Chen's arms with a cold, calculating smile playing on her lips

beats.speaker: Su Wanqing in the Mirror
beats.line: Chen, once we complete the final restoration of 'Su Wanqing'...
beats.lineDelivery: Tone soft and sweet, yet carrying a detached coldness, the ending note rising slightly, filled with calculating pleasure

activeCharacters.name: Su Wanqing in the Mirror
activeCharacters.pose: Looks up, tapping Lu Chen's chin with her fingertip, her smile deepening

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen in the Mirror
activeCharacters.pose: Looks down at her, his gaze remaining gentle

beats.speaker: Su Wanqing in the Mirror
beats.line: There will be no more variables to any of this.
beats.lineDelivery: Voice lowered, carrying a whisper-like intimacy and absolute cruelty, each word falling like a bead of ice

activeCharacters.name: Su Wanqing in the Mirror
activeCharacters.pose: Her lips are almost pressed against Lu Chen's ear, but her gaze pierces through the mirror, staring straight at you

activeCharacters.name: Lu Chen in the Mirror
activeCharacters.pose: Eyes slightly closed, as if immersed in her scent

beats.narration: "Bang—!!!" The mirror suddenly shatters! Countless shards splatter, only to turn into scattering, sparkling points of light in mid-air, vanishing instantly. Only your heavy breathing remains in the bedroom, along with the cold, hard silver brooch in your hand. Those words, like a poisoned needle, pierce deeply into your mind.

effect.nextSceneSeed: In the late-night apartment corridor, you rush toward Lu Chen's room holding the brooch, your heart filled with the anger and fear of betrayal

choices.label: Suppress your fear and carefully recall the details

effect.nextSceneSeed: You close your eyes and concentrate, trying to 'peer' into that timeline again, as light and shadow distort violently before you once more

beats.narration: You force yourself to calm down, pressing your back against the cold wall. The gaze of that other 'you'... and Lu Chen... that smile was exactly the same as the one he usually gives you. Something is wrong. Everything is wrong.

characters.name: Su Wanqing in the Mirror
characters.voiceDescription: Female, around 25 years old. Her voice is warm and magnetic, with a hint of weariness and melancholy. She speaks at a moderate pace with clear pronunciation and a standard Mandarin accent. Her tone harbors complex emotions and determination, creating a mysterious and introverted atmosphere.
characters.visualDescription: A woman in her mid-20s, long black hair with subtle silver streaks, sharp and elegant facial contours, deep-set almond eyes with a contemplative gaze, fair complexion with a delicate scar on the left cheekbone, wearing a tailored high-collar black blazer with intricate silver embroidery resembling rose vines, over a flowing white blouse with a sheer overlay, a mysterious and romantic aura, digital double exposure portrait style, soft pastel color grading, elegant and melancholic atmosphere.

characters.name: Lu Chen in the Mirror
characters.voiceDescription: Female, a young woman in her 20s. Her voice is clear and soft but harbors a trace of coldness and detachment. She has an introverted and deep personality with a complex emotional undertone, mixing love, pain, and resoluteness. Her speaking pace is slow and rhythmic, with a slight echo effect as if coming from a mirror or another dimension, standard Mandarin
characters.visualDescription: Young adult female, 20s, long flowing dark hair with subtle galaxy highlights, sharp and elegant facial contours, deep, mysterious eyes with a hint of melancholy, soft pastel color grading, wearing a flowing, ethereal white dress with delicate rose embroidery and subtle cosmic patterns, overall气质 is elegant, mysterious, romantic, and double exposure aesthetic, digital art style, vertical portrait composition

storyState.logline: When your alternate-timeline self is in love with the same man you deeply love and is plotting a conspiracy, you must choose between erasing her and uncovering the shocking secret behind all the timelines.
storyState.genreTags: Mystery / Multiple Timelines / Female-oriented / Fast-paced Twists / Dark Romance
storyState.protagonist: You, Su Wanqing, possess the 'Double Exposure' ability, allowing you to switch your perception between different timelines. Right now, you clearly see the 'Su Wanqing' of another timeline embracing your beloved boyfriend, Lu Chen, with a cold, calculating light in her eyes that you have never seen before. You want to protect your love and existence, yet you fear that you might be the 'redundant' one. Your weakness is your unconditional love for Lu Chen and a fundamental doubt about the authenticity of your own identity.
storyState.castNotes:
Lu Chen: A gentle and affectionate art restorer, and the object of 'your' deep love in all timelines. His gentleness and talent are intoxicating, but he always seems to be unwittingly involved in different timelines, and his attitude remains ambiguous regarding whether he knows the secret of 'Double Exposure.'
Lin Wei: Lu Chen's colleague and love interest in Timeline A (your current present). She appears weak and harmless but is actually meticulous and calculating. She has a subtle connection with the 'cold Su Wanqing' in Timeline B, potentially acting as a key variable or the mastermind behind the scenes.
Shen Mo: An antique watchmaker living in seclusion in a corner of the city, who knows the ancient secrets of 'time folds' and the 'Double Exposure' ability. He views the overlapping timelines with a near-cold rationality, claiming he can help you solve the problem, though every word he speaks is like a riddle.
storyState.synopsis: While preparing a birthday gift for Lu Chen, Su Wanqing glimpses her alternate-timeline self through a full-length mirror—dressed in a red gown, intimately embracing Lu Chen, and coldly mentioning a 'final restoration' of 'Su Wanqing.' The mirror shatters, leaving her enveloped in fear and a sense of betrayal.
openThreads: The specific meaning and goal of the 'final restoration'
The true identity and purpose of the other Su Wanqing in the mirror
Lu Chen's level of awareness and true stance in this incident
The nature and trigger conditions of the 'Double Exposure' ability
relationships: Lu Chen: Love is suddenly laced with immense doubt and fear; his gentle smile has now become a double image.
Su Wanqing in the Mirror: A clear, cold, and hostile 'self' who poses an immediate threat.
storyState.nextHook: The first immediate reaction Su Wanqing must make after being shocked—will she rush to confront Lu Chen, or try to comprehend this surreal threat? Her choice will determine whether her first battlefield is an emotional confrontation or a quest for the truth.

worldSetting:
This is an AI interactive story game targeted at a 【Female-oriented】 audience, featuring intense dramatic conflicts and rapid twists in the style of Hongguo short videos.
Story Style: Multi-line twists. Pace: Fast and exhilarating.
Opening setting of the featured story 'The Double in the Mirror': She possesses the 'double exposure' ability to switch between different timelines. When she discovers that her alternate-timeline self is in love with the same man she deeply loves and is plotting a conspiracy, she must make a choice: erase her other self, or uncover the shocking secret behind all the timelines.
Please dive straight into this opening to give the player a strong sense of immersion and excitement; subsequent branches should maintain the twist density of short dramas, allowing players to see immediate consequences for every choice.
styleGuide: Digital double exposure portrait, vertical composition. A vertical silhouette profile of a strikingly beautiful woman with elegant, sharp facial contours, merged seamlessly with blooming roses and a starry galaxy inside her hair. Soft pastel color grading, elegant, mysterious and romantic.
